name: obsidian-webdav-sync
description: Sync your Obsidian vault with a self-hosted WebDAV server over Tailscale.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: npx tsx src/conflict.test.ts && npx tsx src/sync.test.ts && npx tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json src/sync-integration.test.ts
